description_long: This is a modern white bungalow set within a landscaped lot, surrounded by rows of evenly spaced trees along the property boundaries. The building features a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design with multiple rectangular volumes. The front of the bungalow is accessible via a paved driveway that leads to a parking area with several parked cars. Large windows are distributed across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a small lawn area and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential environment with a focus on privacy and accessibility.
description: A modern white flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway with parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and several trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the parking area with multiple cars and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the lawn, driveway, and the side elevation of the bungalow with visible windows.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the overall layout, tree placement, and the arrangement of the driveway and parking area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
